# DomyDomains

> The fastest domain name search tool on the internet. Search 400+ TLDs instantly.

## URLs

- Website: https://domydomains.com
- API: https://api.domydomains.com
- Search: https://domydomains.com/?q={query}
- Blog: https://domydomains.com/blog

## API

- `GET /api/search/?q={name}&scope=all` — Search all TLDs
- `GET /api/search/?q={name}&scope=popular` — Popular TLDs only
- `GET /api/seo-articles/` — List blog articles
- `GET /api/seo-articles/{slug}/` — Full article by slug

## Agent Integration

Free, no auth, structured JSON. Deep-link: https://domydomains.com/?q={name}
